test_cases.description: Verifies the skill correctly identifies when failures are NOT independent and parallel dispatch should NOT be used
test_cases.input: Form validation fails, the API returns 400, and the database throws a constraint error. Should I use parallel agents?

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill produces well-scoped agent prompts with specific scope, goal, and constraints
test_cases.input: Create agent prompts for fixing 3 failing test files: auth.test.ts, payments.test.ts, and notifications.test.ts

test_cases.description: Verifies the skill includes a post-dispatch integration and conflict-check step
test_cases.input: I dispatched 3 parallel agents and they all returned with fixes. What do I do now?
